---
title: "NBA 2025-26 Player Stats"
format: html
jupyter: ggsql
---

## Points per Turnover

Scoring efficiency leaders for the 2025-26 regular season (min. 30 min/game).

```{ggsql}
SELECT PLAYER, CAST(PTS AS FLOAT) / TOV AS pts_per_tov
FROM 'nba_player_stats_2026.csv'
WHERE GP >= 30 AND CAST(MIN AS FLOAT) / GP >= 30 AND TOV > 0
ORDER BY pts_per_tov DESC
LIMIT 20
VISUALISE PLAYER AS x, pts_per_tov AS y
DRAW bar
LABEL title => 'Points Per Turnover Leaders', x => 'Player', y => 'PTS / TOV'
```

## Scoring vs. Assists

```{ggsql}
SELECT PTS / GP AS ppg, AST / GP AS apg, EFF AS efficiency, PLAYER
FROM 'nba_player_stats_2026.csv'
WHERE GP >= 30 AND CAST(MIN AS FLOAT) / GP >= 30
VISUALISE ppg AS x, apg AS y, efficiency AS color
DRAW point
LABEL title => 'Scoring vs. Assists Per Game', x => 'Points Per Game', y => 'Assists Per Game'
```

## Three-Point Volume vs. Efficiency

Players with at least 100 three-point attempts.

```{ggsql}
SELECT FG3A AS attempts, FG3_PCT AS pct, PLAYER, TEAM
FROM 'nba_player_stats_2026.csv'
WHERE GP >= 30 AND CAST(MIN AS FLOAT) / GP >= 30 AND FG3A >= 100
VISUALISE attempts AS x, pct AS y
DRAW point
LABEL title => '3PT Attempts vs. 3PT%', x => '3-Point Attempts', y => '3-Point %'
```

## Rebounds vs. Blocks

```{ggsql}
SELECT REB / GP AS rpg, BLK / GP AS bpg, PTS / GP AS ppg
FROM 'nba_player_stats_2026.csv'
WHERE GP >= 30 AND CAST(MIN AS FLOAT) / GP >= 30
VISUALISE rpg AS x, bpg AS y, ppg AS color
DRAW point
LABEL title => 'Rebounds vs. Blocks Per Game', x => 'Rebounds Per Game', y => 'Blocks Per Game'
```
